Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class PermissionSetLicense

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.PermissionSetLicense
public class PermissionSetLicense extends SObject

Java class for PermissionSetLicense complex type

.
